# Comparison-heavy Rustic loop showcase combining nested blocks, local helper functions, function values, and boolean guards.
let n = 1; let score = 0; while n <= 8 { { fn in_range(x) { x >= 3 && x <= 6 }; if in_range(n) && n != 5 { score = score + n } else { 0 } }; n = n + 1; }; score => 13
let n = 1; let total = 0; while n <= 7 { { fn is_edge(x) { x < 3 || x > 5 }; let keep = is_edge; if keep(n) { total = total + n } else { 0 } }; n = n + 1; }; total => 16
